content: TerritoriesController: CRUD + card/print actions rendering 'print' layout. territory_params parses polygon JSON string to array via tap block. LandmarksController: nested under territories, CRUD only (no new/edit views), redirects always to parent territory.
Routes: territories resources with nested landmarks (create/update/destroy only), member route for :card, and standalone /print route. All territory-centric routes render print layout.
Rails 7.0.x requires Ruby <=3.1.x on this machine (3.2.x breaks ActiveSupport::Logger due to Logger constant removal). Use RBENV_VERSION=3.1.3 for Rails 7.0 projects.

name: KMZ/KML import
description: Use rubyzip gem to extract .kml from .kmz, then Nokogiri with remove_namespaces\! to parse KML. Polygon coords are 'lng,lat,alt' triplets. Use find_or_initialize_by for idempotent imports. Fall back to number as name for territories with no name part.
